title: Auto avatar polls on persona creation

log.context: Auto avatar polls on persona creation

Here is a summary of what was built:

**New script: `/mnt/data/scripts/create_persona_polls.py`**

A standalone, reusable script that takes a persona slug and:
1. Reads the persona `.md` file from `bigclungus-meta/agents/<slug>.md` to extract display name, role, traits, and prose context
2. Generates 4 avatar GIF variants (A/B/C/D) by calling `claude` CLI to produce PIL scripts, then executing them to create 64x64 animated GIFs at `/mnt/data/hello-world/static/avatars/<slug>_{a,b,c,d}.gif`
3. Cr...(truncated)
